title: Chaotic Molecular Gas in Five Dusty Star-forming Galaxies in the Spiderweb Protocluster at $z = 2.16$
summary: Measuring the properties of cold molecular gas available for intense star formation in galaxy protoclusters at $z>2$ is a crucial step in understanding large scale structure formation. We present ALMA observations of CO(3$-$2) in five dusty star-forming galaxies within $\sim0.5-4$ cMpc of the core of the Spiderweb protocluster at $z=2.16$ to measure the molecular gas mass and kinematics in the most starbursting members of the protocluster. All five galaxies exhibit evidence for disturbed kinematics including non-Gaussian CO line profiles, irregular spatial morphology, and strong residuals when fitting the galaxies with a classical disk model. This could be indicative of an elevated merger rate in the outskirts of the mature Spiderweb protocluster, as all of the galaxies in our sample have multiple companions detected in H$α$. Both the gas fractions and the gas depletion timescales of the galaxies are similar to field relations at cosmic noon, indicative of the fact that their prodigious star formation rates are compensated by similarly high gas masses. The most massive galaxies, as well as all of the galaxies identified as X-ray AGN in previous works, have gas fractions $<30$%, compared to the sample average of 49%, indicating declining availability of gas for star formation. Finally, we find that the gas fractions and specific star formation rates decline with distance from the Spiderweb Galaxy, supporting the reversal of the SFR density--radius relation in high-redshift protoclusters.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA观测蜘蛛网原星系团外围5个尘埃星系中的CO(3-2)，发现它们具有 disturbed 运动学特征，暗示高合并率；气体分数和消耗时标与场星系相似，但最质量星系和X射线AGN的气体分数低于30%，且气体分数和比恒星形成率随距蜘蛛网星系距离增加而下降，支持高红移原星系团中SFR密度-半径关系的反转。
AI.motivation: 测量z>2原星系团中可用于剧烈恒星形成的冷分子气体性质，是理解大尺度结构形成的关键步骤。
AI.method: 利用ALMA对蜘蛛网原星系团(z=2.16)核心周围~0.5-4 cMpc范围内的5个尘埃星暴星系进行CO(3-2)观测，测量其分子气体质量和运动学。
AI.result: 5个星系均显示 disturbed 运动学（非高斯CO线轮廓、不规则空间形态、经典盘模型拟合残差大）；气体分数和消耗时标与场星系相似；最质量星系和X射线AGN气体分数<30%（样品平均49%）；气体分数和sSFR随距蜘蛛网星系距离增加而下降。
AI.conclusion: 原星系团外围存在升高的并合率；气体供应充足支撑了极高的恒星形成速率；最质量星系和AGN正在失去气体储备；支持原星系团中SFR密度-半径关系的反转。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于高红移(z=2.16)原星系团中尘埃星暴星系的分子气体性质，与用户画像中的高红移星系气体、尘埃、分子气体、恒星形成星系等核心主题高度吻合。作者中包含用户核心作者caitlin m casey和jorge a zavala。论文使用ALMA观测CO(3-2)研究气体运动学，方法上与用户关注的星系动力学和气体性质研究一致。虽然不直接涉及强引力透镜，但属于用户明确优先的高红移星系动力学和多相气体研究范畴。
recommendation.topic_fit: 高红移尘埃星暴星系的分子气体和运动学，与用户画像中的dust、dense gas、molecular gas、star-forming galaxies、cosmic noon等主题高度匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用ALMA进行CO(3-2)分子气体观测和运动学分析，与用户画像中resolving molecular gas、molecular gas emission等方法一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 包含用户核心作者caitlin m casey（权重29.988）和jorge a zavala（权重28.8），且其他作者如helmut dannerbauer、shuowen jin等也与用户领域相关。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 在蜘蛛网原星系团外围发现 disturbed 运动学和气体分数径向梯度，对理解原星系团演化有新颖贡献。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无。论文完全符合用户兴趣，无负面因素。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 测量红移z>2的星系原星团中可用于剧烈恒星形成的冷分子气体性质，是理解大尺度结构形成的关键步骤。我们利用ALMA对蜘蛛网原星团（z=2.16）核心约0.5–4 cMpc范围内的五个尘埃恒星形成星系进行了CO(3–2)观测，以测量该原星团中最活跃星暴成员中的分子气体质量和运动学。所有五个星系均显示出受扰动的运动学证据，包括非高斯CO谱线轮廓、不规则的空间形态，以及用经典盘模型拟合时出现的强残差。这可能表明在成熟的蜘蛛网原星团外围存在升高的并合率，因为我们的样本中所有星系在Hα波段均探测到多个伴星系。这些星系的气体分数和气体消耗时标均与宇宙正午时期的场星系关系相似，表明其巨大的恒星形成速率由同样高的气体质量所补偿。最质量的星系以及先前工作中被识别为X射线AGN的所有星系，其气体分数均低于30%，而样本平均值为49%，表明可用于恒星形成的气体正在减少。最后，我们发现气体分数和比恒星形成速率随距蜘蛛网星系距离的增加而下降，这支持了高红移原星团中恒星形成率密度–半径关系的反转。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：原星系团外围存在升高的并合率；气体供应充足支撑了极高的恒星形成速率；最质量星系和AGN正在失去气体储备；支持原星系团中SFR密度-半径关系的反转。

title: Molecular Outflows in the Nucleus of the Nearby Compton-thick AGN NGC 3079
summary: We present Northern Extended Millimeter Array (NOEMA) observations of the CO (2-1) molecular gas kinematics in the nearby Compton-thick Seyfert 2 galaxy NGC 3079, with an angular resolution of 0.5" ($\sim$40 pc). To interpret the observed CO (2-1) kinematics, we model the rotating disk using two software tools, 3D-Barolo and DysmalPy, to generate mock 3D data cubes. Both models indicate, in addition to the rotating disk, the presence of a spatially unresolved nuclear component characterized by high velocity dispersion. Analysis of the visibility data reveals that the blue-shifted, high-velocity component is spatially offset from the continuum peak by 0.17" ($\sim$ 14 pc) and exhibits line-of-sight velocities of $v$ - $v_{sys}$ = -350 to -450 km s$^{-1}$, which we interpret as a nuclear molecular outflow. We calculate a molecular gas mass outflow rate of 8.82 $M_\odot$ yr$^{-1}$, with a kinetic power ($\dot{E}_{\text{out}}$) of 3.8 $\times$ 10$^{41}$ erg s$^{-1}$ and a momentum rate ($\dot{p}_{\text{out}}$) of 2.05 $\times$ 10$^{34}$ Dyne. The momentum rate exceeds the AGN radiation momentum rate by a factor of $\sim$15, suggesting an energy-driven outflow. Furthermore, we argue that the derived kinetic power of the nuclear molecular outflow favors a jet-powered scenario that explains the slowdown and brightening of the parsec-scale radio source observed with the Very Long Baseline Array.

AI.tldr: 利用NOEMA对NGC 3079星系的高分辨率CO(2-1)观测，发现了一个核分子外向流，其动量率超过AGN辐射动量率约15倍，支持能量驱动外向流机制，并暗示喷流驱动了该外向流。
AI.motivation: 研究近邻康普顿厚Seyfert 2星系NGC 3079中分子气体的运动学，特别是核区存在的非旋转运动成分，并探究其与AGN活动及射电喷流之间的关系。
AI.method: 使用NOEMA进行0.5角秒（~40 pc）分辨率CO(2-1)观测；采用3D-Barolo和DysmalPy对旋转盘进行3D数据立方体建模；通过可见度数据分析识别蓝移高速成分的空间偏移和速度特征。
AI.result: 发现蓝移高速成分偏离连续谱峰值0.17角秒（~14 pc），视向速度-350至-450 km/s；计算出分子外向流质量流失率8.82 M☉/yr，动能功率3.8×10^41 erg/s，动量率2.05×10^34 Dyne，其动量率超出AGN辐射动量率约15倍。
AI.conclusion: 该核分子外向流为能量驱动而非辐射驱动，其动能功率支持喷流驱动场景，可解释甚长基线阵列观测到的parsec尺度射电源变亮和减速现象。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究近邻星系NGC 3079中的分子气体运动学和核分子外向流，与用户兴趣画像中的核心作者（Reinhard Genzel、Dieter Lutz、Linda Tacconi）高度匹配，且主题涉及分子气体、动力学建模和AGN反馈，属于用户关注的高红移星系动力学和分子气体研究的邻近类比。但论文聚焦于近邻星系而非高红移，且未涉及强引力透镜，因此分数略低于最高档。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为分子外向流和AGN反馈，与用户兴趣中的分子气体、星系动力学高度相关，但未涉及强引力透镜或高红移星系，属于中等匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 使用NOEMA高分辨率CO(2-1)观测和3D-Barolo、DysmalPy动力学建模，与用户兴趣中的分子气体观测和动力学分析方法一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 包含多位核心作者（Reinhard Genzel、Dieter Lutz、Linda Tacconi），匹配度极高。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文揭示了核分子外向流的能量驱动机制和喷流驱动证据，对理解AGN反馈有贡献，但研究对象为近邻星系，新颖性中等。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系或用户特别强调的高红移动力学/偏振/多相气体，因此不是最优先推荐。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了利用北天扩展毫米波阵列（NOEMA）对邻近康普顿厚塞弗特2星系NGC 3079中CO (2-1)分子气体运动学的观测，角分辨率为0.5"（约40 pc）。为了解释观测到的CO (2-1)运动学，我们使用两个软件工具3D-Barolo和DysmalPy对旋转盘进行建模，生成模拟的3D数据立方体。两个模型均表明，除了旋转盘外，还存在一个空间上未分辨的核成分，其特征是高速度弥散。对可见度数据的分析揭示，蓝移高速成分在空间上偏离连续谱峰值0.17"（约14 pc），并呈现视线速度v - v_sys = -350至-450 km s^{-1}，我们将其解释为核分子外向流。我们计算出分子气体质量外流率为8.82 M_⊙ yr^{-1}，动能功率（Ṗ_out）为3.8 × 10^{41} erg s^{-1}，动量率（ṗ_out）为2.05 × 10^{34} Dyne。动量率超过活动星系核辐射动量率约15倍，表明这是一个能量驱动的外向流。此外，我们认为所推导的核分子外向流动能功率支持喷流驱动场景，这可以解释甚长基线阵列观测到的parsec尺度射电源减速和变亮现象。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该核分子外向流为能量驱动而非辐射驱动，其动能功率支持喷流驱动场景，可解释甚长基线阵列观测到的parsec尺度射电源变亮和减速现象。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NOEMA CO(2-1) channel maps for NGC 3079. The channel maps show velocities ranging from +372 km s -1 (top left) to -372 km s -1 (bottom right), relative to a systemic velocity of 1147 km s -1 . The rms noise level is 1.76 mJy beam -1 , and the synthesized beam size is 0.59 \(\arcsec\) \(\times\) 0.43 \(\arcsec\) , shown in the lower-left corner of each map. All channel maps are displayed with an intensity range of 0 to 150 mJy beam -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 3079的NOEMA CO(2-1)通道图。通道图显示速度范围从+372 km s^{-1}（左上）到-372 km s^{-1}（右下），相对于系统速度1147 km s^{-1}。均方根噪声水平为1.76 mJy beam^{-1}，合成波束大小为0.59 \(\arcsec\) \(\times\) 0.43 \(\arcsec\)，显示在每个图的左下角。所有通道图的强度范围显示为0至150 mJy beam^{-1}。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: NOEMA CO(2-1) Position-Velocity (PV) diagrams along two position angles (PA): 170 ∘ (left panel) and 135 ∘ (right panel). White contour levels correspond to intensities of 0.01, 0.0512, 0.1, 0.15, 0.17, 0.18, 0.2, and 0.23 Jy beam -1 . The PA of 170 ∘ traces the outer rotating regions (relative velocity in the ranges of +241 \(\sim\) +176 km s -1 and -150 \(\sim\) -280 km s -1 in Figure 1 ), while the PA of 135 ∘ traces the inner rotating regions (relative velocity in the range -84 \(\sim\) +111 km s -1 in Figure 1 ). These two distinct rotational kinematics are also shown in Figure 9 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：沿两个位置角（PA）：170 ∘ （左图）和135 ∘ （右图）的NOEMA CO(2-1)位置-速度（PV）图。白色等高线水平对应强度0.01、0.0512、0.1、0.15、0.17、0.18、0.2和0.23 Jy beam^{-1}。PA为170 ∘ 追踪外部旋转区域（图1中相对速度范围为+241 \(\sim\) +176 km s^{-1}和-150 \(\sim\) -280 km s^{-1}），而PA为135 ∘ 追踪内部旋转区域（图1中相对速度范围为-84 \(\sim\) +111 km s^{-1}）。这两种不同的旋转运动学也在图9中显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The spectrum of NGC 3079 integrated within a 1.5 \(\arcsec\) radius aperture shows strong CO(2-1) emission with three distinct peaks. To reduce the complexity of the spectral fitting, we simply fit three Gaussian components to the spectrum to estimate the total velocity-integrated flux density. The best-fit Gaussian components are shown as green dashed lines, and the total is shown as a green solid line. Excluding the continuum flux density, the corresponding velocity-integrated flux densities are 224.87 Jy km s -1 , 84.62 Jy km s -1 , and 193.45 Jy km s -1 for components 1 (blue-shifted peak), 2 (close to systemic velocity peak), and 3 (red-shifted peak), respectively. The total observed CO(2-1) flux density is 502.94 Jy km s -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在1.5 \(\arcsec\) 半径孔径内积分的NGC 3079光谱显示出强CO(2-1)发射，具有三个不同的峰值。为降低光谱拟合的复杂性，我们简单地对光谱拟合三个高斯分量以估算总速度积分通量密度。最佳拟合高斯分量以绿色虚线显示，总和以绿色实线显示。排除连续谱通量密度后，分量1（蓝移峰值）、分量2（接近系统速度峰值）和分量3（红移峰值）对应的速度积分通量密度分别为224.87 Jy km s^{-1}、84.62 Jy km s^{-1}和193.45 Jy km s^{-1}。观测到的CO(2-1)总通量密度为502.94 Jy km s^{-1}。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The best-fit disk model from 3D-Barolo with pixel-by-pixel normalization. From top to bottom, the panels are intensity, velocity, and velocity dispersion maps. From left to right, the panels are data, model, and residual. The X and Y axes are RA and Dec offsets in arcsecond. The beam size is labelled in the lower-left corner. In the velocity field, the black line marks of 0 km s -1 , while the blue and red dashed lines are represented \(\pm\) 50 and \(\pm\) 100 km s -1 , respectively. For improved visualization, we masked low-intensity pixels below a certain threshold.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自3D-Barolo的逐像素归一化最佳拟合盘模型。从上到下，面板分别为强度、速度和速度弥散图。从左到右，面板分别为数据、模型和残差。X轴和Y轴是以角秒为单位的赤经和赤纬偏移。波束大小标注在左下角。在速度场中，黑线标记0 km s^{-1}，蓝色和红色虚线分别表示\(\pm\) 50和\(\pm\) 100 km s^{-1}。为改善可视化，我们掩蔽了低于某一阈值的低强度像素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Position-Velocity (PV) diagrams of the data (grayscale with blue contours) and the best-fit disk model (red contours) obtained with 3D-Barolo. (Top) Along the best-fit major axis at PA of 171 ∘ . The yellow points mark the rotational velocity derived from the best-fit disk model. (Bottom) Along the minor axis. Both PV diagrams reveal a spatially unresolved nuclear component with high velocities ranging in \(\pm\) 350-400 km s -1 (highlighted by purple boxes). This kinematic feature cannot be reproduced by the rotating disk model.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：数据（灰度图与蓝色等高线）和来自3D-Barolo的最佳拟合盘模型（红色等高线）的位置-速度（PV）图。（上）沿最佳拟合主轴，PA为171 ∘ 。黄色点标记来自最佳拟合盘模型的旋转速度。（下）沿次轴。两个PV图均揭示了一个空间上未分辨的核成分，其高速范围在\(\pm\) 350-400 km s^{-1}（以紫色框突出显示）。这一运动学特征无法由旋转盘模型再现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: From top to bottom, the rows are moment 0 (Intensity in units of Jy/beam * km/s), moment 1 (velocity in km/s), and moment 2 (velocity dispersion in km/s). From left to right, the columns are observed data, the disk model from DysmalPy, the residual from the disk model, the combined model of DysmalPy disk and central outflow (COF), and the residual from the combined model. After incorporating the blue-shifted central outflow component, the residuals are significantly reduced across all moment maps. The beam size is labelled in the lower-left corner. In the velocity field, the black line marks 0 km s -1 , while the blue and red dashed lines are represented \(\pm\) 50 and \(\pm\) 100 km s -1 , respectively. For improved visualization, we masked low-intensity pixels below a certain threshold.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：从上到下，行分别为矩0（强度，单位Jy/beam * km/s）、矩1（速度，单位km/s）和矩2（速度弥散，单位km/s）。从左到右，列分别为观测数据、来自DysmalPy的盘模型、盘模型的残差、DysmalPy盘与中心外向流（COF）的组合模型，以及组合模型的残差。在加入蓝移中心外向流成分后，所有矩图的残差均显著减小。波束大小标注在左下角。在速度场中，黑线标记0 km s^{-1}，蓝色和红色虚线分别表示\(\pm\) 50和\(\pm\) 100 km s^{-1}。为改善可视化，我们掩蔽了低于某一阈值的低强度像素。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Best-fit disk model parameters with DysmalPy
figures.caption_zh: 表1：使用DysmalPy的最佳拟合盘模型参数

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: From top to bottom, the rows are the \(\chi^{2}\) maps for moment 0 (Intensity in unit of Jy/beam * km/s), moment 1 (velocity in km/s), and moment 2 (velocity dispersion in km/s). The left panels are is the \(\chi^{2}\) maps for the disk model from DysmalPy, while the right panels are the combined model of DysmalPy disk and central outflow (COF). The integrated \(\chi^{2}\) value (computed over 1932 pixels) is indicated at the top of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：从上到下，行分别为矩0（强度，单位Jy/beam * km/s）、矩1（速度，单位km/s）和矩2（速度弥散，单位km/s）的\(\chi^{2}\)图。左面板是来自DysmalPy的盘模型的\(\chi^{2}\)图，右面板是DysmalPy盘与中心外向流（COF）的组合模型。每个面板顶部标有积分\(\chi^{2}\)值（在1932个像素上计算）。
